steps.title: Recognize 39 as the y-intercept
steps.content: The function $f(x) = 39 - 0.18x$ can be written as $f(x) = -0.18x + 39$, which shows 39 is the constant term. In any linear function, this constant is the y-intercept — the value when $x = 0$. So $b = 39$.

steps.title: Evaluate at the start of the experiment
steps.content:
Since $x$ represents days after the start, $x = 0$ is the start of the experiment. Evaluating there:
$$f(0) = 39 - 0.18(0) = 39$$
The water height at the start is 39 cm. That matches choice A — A is correct.
